subject: Pipeline Alert: Database Restore Check Failed

body.content:
🚨 Pipeline Alert: Database Restore Check Failed

🕒 Timestamp: {trigger_time}

📁 Fabric Workspace Name: {workspace_name}

📄 Pipeline Name: {pipeline_name}

📦 Data Product: {data_product}

⚠️ Issue: The restore checks for {database_names} did not complete within the configured time window. As a result, the daily pipeline for {feed_name} feed was not executed.

🔍 Details & Links:

  • 🔗 Pipeline Run
  • 📊 Operational Dashboard - Not Implemented

🚧 Action Required: Please contact the GUARDTech team for investigation and resolution.
